stream_samples.text: coinbase KYC stuck on "verifying your ID" for 6 days. Submitted a passport and selfie three times. Cannot trade, cannot withdraw.
Tried to withdraw USDC after the ETF rally Wednesday — got "processing" for 38 hours. Coinbase blamed "network congestion" but on-chain was clear.
[#KYC-22041 P1] new account sign-up rejected after liveness check, no reason returned to the user. Repro'd on iOS 17.5 and Android 14.
swapped on Base, gas was quoted at $0.20 in the wallet preview, paid $4.80. L2 fee estimator is broken since the last app update.
KYC vendor v2 model is rejecting valid US driver licenses with holographic overlays. Manual review queue has 11.2k pending, oldest is 9 days.
Staked ETH rewards stopped distributing for 4 epochs. Support says "under investigation" — meanwhile my rewards balance is frozen.
KYC throughput dropped 28% week-over-week after vendor v2 rollout. Manual queue is the bottleneck — every new-account funnel metric is regressing.
Coinbase One renewed at $29.99 even though I downgraded to free tier on April 2. Receipt says "premium plan" but the app shows free. Confused.
2FA recovery loop: reset link goes to login, login asks for the 2FA I'm trying to recover. Trapped. Submitted a ticket 11 days ago.
[#TRADE-8814] NFT listing failed with "contract not whitelisted" — collection has been live for 6 months. Repro on web only, mobile works.
the new portfolio P&L breakdown by asset is clean. Finally don't need a third-party tracker for my Coinbase positions.
is anyone else's KYC just sitting in 'review' for over a week? happened twice in a month, different accounts
[kyc-orchestrator] vendor v2 hard-rejects holographic licenses; fallback to manual queue is unbounded — needs a hard SLA + auto-route to vendor v1.
User submitted Brazilian RG, vendor returned "document not supported" but our policy doc says it is. Translation pipeline regressed.

clusters.title: KYC throughput collapse on vendor v2 rollout
Withdrawal SLA breaches after high-volume periods
L2 gas fee estimator under-quotes Base/Optimism
Coinbase One downgrade then renewal billing bug
NFT listing fails on whitelisted collections (web)

top_epic.title: Restore KYC throughput post vendor-v2 rollout
top_epic.rationale: 2,410 signals — concentrated in new-account sign-ups — converge on a single root cause: the v2 KYC vendor hard-rejects valid documents (holographic US licenses, Brazilian RG, EU ID) and the manual-review fallback is unbounded. Compliance Ops reports an 11.2k queue with a 9-day oldest item, KYC throughput is down 28% week-over-week, and every downstream funnel metric (first-trade, first-deposit, activation) is regressing.
top_epic.verdict: Activation-critical — the entire new-user funnel is gated on this.
top_epic.recommendation: Auto-route hard-reject document classes to vendor v1, cap manual-queue SLA at 24 hours, and add a CI shadow-eval against a labeled doc-corpus before any vendor model promotion.
acceptance_criteria: kyc-orchestrator auto-routes hard-reject classes (holographic US DL, BR RG, EU ID) to vendor v1 within 30s of rejection
Manual-review queue SLA enforced at 24h p95; pages on-call when queue depth > 5k
KYC pass-rate returns to within 3pp of pre-v2 baseline across top 10 doc types
Shadow-eval gate against 50k-doc labeled corpus required before any vendor model promotion

evidence.quote: KYC throughput dropped 28% week-over-week after vendor v2 rollout. Manual queue is the bottleneck.
Manual review queue has 11.2k pending, oldest is 9 days.
vendor v2 hard-rejects holographic licenses; fallback to manual queue is unbounded.
